entities.name: PICALM
entities.description: Phosphatidylinositol binding clathrin-assembly protein gene; most significant AD genetic susceptibility locus after APOE and BIN1
entities.evidence: PICALM (Phosphatidylinositol binding clathrin-assembly protein) gene as the most significant genetic susceptibility locus after APOE and BIN1

entities.name: PICALM
entities.description: Clathrin-adaptor protein critical for clathrin-mediated endocytosis and autophagy
entities.evidence: PICALM is a clathrin-adaptor protein that plays a critical role in clathrin-mediated endocytosis and autophagy

entities.name: APOE
entities.description: Apolipoprotein E gene; top AD susceptibility locus
entities.evidence: the most significant genetic susceptibility locus after APOE and BIN1

entities.name: BIN1
entities.description: Bridging integrator 1 gene; second most significant AD susceptibility locus after APOE
entities.evidence: the most significant genetic susceptibility locus after APOE and BIN1

entities.name: APP
entities.description: Amyloid precursor protein gene; processing modulated by PICALM
entities.evidence: differential modulation of APP processing...by PICALM

entities.name: amyloid precursor protein
entities.description: APP protein whose processing is modulated by PICALM

entities.name: amyloid beta
entities.description: Aβ peptide; transcytosis modulated by PICALM

entities.name: tau
entities.description: Tau protein; pathology progression modulated by PICALM
entities.evidence: significant effects of PICALM modulation of tau pathology progression

entities.name: Alzheimer disease
entities.description: Neurodegenerative disease; PICALM is major genetic risk factor

entities.name: clathrin-mediated endocytosis
entities.description: Endocytic pathway requiring PICALM as clathrin-adaptor protein
entities.evidence: PICALM is a clathrin-adaptor protein that plays a critical role in clathrin-mediated endocytosis

entities.name: autophagy
entities.description: Cellular degradation pathway regulated by PICALM
entities.evidence: plays a critical role in clathrin-mediated endocytosis and autophagy

entities.name: PICALM
entities.description: Genetic variants serve as AD susceptibility biomarker confirmed across independent cohorts
entities.evidence: effects of genetic variants of PICALM as AD-susceptibility loci have been confirmed by independent genetic studies in several distinct cohorts

entities.name: amyloid beta transcytosis
entities.description: PICALM-mediated Aβ transport across cellular barriers

entities.name: tau pathology
entities.description: Tau pathology progression modulated by PICALM in AD models
entities.evidence: significant effects of PICALM modulation of tau pathology progression have also been evidenced in Alzheimer's disease models
